name: YT Shorts Pilot v0.4 (full autonomy: GPT scenario -> render -> publish)

parameters.text: ={{ 'YT Pilot v0.4: no queued topics for ' + $json.today + '. Module A (G_A_topic_distiller) should have populated the queue — check.' }}
={{ 'YT Pilot v0.4 render fail slug=' + $('Build scenario payload').first().json.slug + ' error=' + ($json.error || 'unknown') + ' log=' + ($json.log || 'no log').toString().slice(-300) + '' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ mp4_path: $json.mp4_path, title: $json.title, description: $json.description, tags: $json.tags, lang: $json.lang, privacy: $json.privacy, slug: $json.slug, topic_id: $json.topic_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ slug: $('Build YT payload').first().json.slug, video_id: $('POST /youtube/upload').first().json.video_id, youtube_url: $('POST /youtube/upload').first().json.url, tg_message_id: ($json.result && $json.result.message_id) || null, privacy: 'public', title: $('Build YT payload').first().json.title, notes: 'Auto-published by YT Shorts Pilot v0.4 (full autonomy: GPT scenario + render + upload)' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'published', published_at: new Date().toISOString(), has_video: true, video_slug: $('Build YT payload').first().json.slug, notes: 'YT: ' + $('POST /youtube/upload').first().json.url }) }}

parameters.text: ={{ 'YT Pilot v0.4 ZERO-TOUCH DONE slug: ' + $('Build YT payload').first().json.slug + ' youtube: ' + $('POST /youtube/upload').first().json.url + ' hype: ' + $('Normalize topic').first().json.hype_score + ' render: ' + $('POST /render_queued (sync, up to 40 min)').first().json.duration_s + 's, upload: ' + $('POST /youtube/upload').first().json.duration_s + 's' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ mp4_path: $('Build IG/FB captions').first().json.mp4_path, caption: $('Build IG/FB captions').first().json.ig_caption }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ mp4_path: $('Build IG/FB captions').first().json.mp4_path, description: $('Build IG/FB captions').first().json.fb_description }) }}
